case_title: MIRABELLI FRANK D. VS CORTEZO MARIE C.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZO MARIE C.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MIRABELLI FRANK D. AS TO DEFENDANT CORTEZO MARIE C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
